bullets.text: Led foundational analytics framework for a major retail prescription distributor using Python, SQL, and Celonis — drove targeted fulfillment improvements and enabled multimillion-dollar value capture.
Developed an LLM-powered application using GPT-4o, OCR via Docling, and prompt engineering to automate analysis of Master Service Agreements and Order Forms for the legal team.
bullets.impact: Eliminated hours of manual legal review

bullets.text: Built an S-BERT string clustering model analyzing 2M+ purchase orders across two procurement branches for a leading American automotive company.
Implemented a fuzzy matching algorithm to detect and recover duplicate invoice payments across enterprise AP workflows.
Led Celonis AI Labs and national hackathons — guided enterprise teams from 20+ companies in prototyping AI-driven process mining use cases.
bullets.impact: National scale events driving production AI adoption

bullets.text: Applied SQL and Python to clean and preprocess consumer data, ensuring integrity for supply chain logistics analysis.
Developed a clustering model identifying products frequently purchased together, enabling targeted marketing strategies.
bullets.impact: Measurable sales growth across 17 key SKUs

bullets.text: Built REST API endpoints using NestJS, TypeScript, and AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3) for the US's first high-speed rail company's mobile application.
bullets.impact: Shipped to production across iOS and Android

bullets.text: Automated CI/CD pipelines and unit testing using YAML scripts and GitHub Actions alongside AWS services.
bullets.impact: Reduced deployment friction and improved release stability

bullets.text: Revamped the developer console using JavaScript, React.js, and Node.js — improving UX for third-party developers integrating humanID.
Built a Discord bot using Python, Flask, and the Discord API to automate company-wide milestone notifications.
bullets.impact: Improved team visibility into company progress
